data.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = ? AND table_name = ? AND column_name = ?
UPDATE users SET last_activity_at = NOW() WHERE id = ?
SELECT photo_path, permissions_json FROM users WHERE id = ? LIMIT 1

SELECT r.*, f.transaction_number, f.transaction_type, f.amount as current_amount, approver.name as approved_by_name, rejector.name as rejected_by_name FROM finance_change_requests r INNER JOIN finances f ON f.id = r.finance_id LEFT JOIN users approver ON approver.id = r.approved_by LEFT JOIN users r

SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM members
SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM members WHERE membership_status = 'Active'
SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM members WHERE created_at >= ? AND created_at < ?
SELECT SUM(amount) as total FROM finances WHERE transaction_type <> 'Expense' AND transaction_date >= ? AND transaction_date < ?
SELECT SUM(amount) as total FROM finances WHERE transaction_type = 'Expense' AND transaction_date >= ? AND transaction_date < ?
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) as total FROM finances WHERE department_id IS NULL AND transaction_type <> 'Expense'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) as total FROM finances WHERE department_id IS NULL AND transaction_type = 'Expense'
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM finances WHERE department_id IS NULL

SELECT d.id as department_id, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.transaction_type <> 'Expense' THEN f.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as income_total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.transaction_type = 'Expense' THEN f.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as expense_total FROM departments d LEFT JOIN finances f ON f.department_id = d.id W
SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = ? AND table_name = ?

SELECT r.*, d.name as department_name, requester.name as requested_by_name FROM department_expense_requests r INNER JOIN departments d ON d.id = r.department_id INNER JOIN users requester ON requester.id = r.requested_by WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(r.status, 'pending')) = 'pending' ORDER BY r.created_at DE

SELECT f.*, CONCAT(COALESCE(m.first_name,''), ' ', COALESCE(m.last_name,'')) as member_name, d.name as department_name, u.name as recorded_by_name FROM finances f LEFT JOIN members m ON m.id = f.member_id LEFT JOIN departments d ON d.id = f.department_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = f.recorded_by ORD

SELECT d.id as department_id, d.name as department_name, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.transaction_type <> 'Expense' THEN f.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as income_total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.transaction_type = 'Expense' THEN f.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as expense_total FROM departments d LEFT JOIN finances f
SELECT COALESCE( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance WHERE status = 'Present' AND service_date >= ?) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance WHERE service_date >= ?), 0) * 100, 0 ) as rate
SELECT SUM(amount) as total FROM finances WHERE transaction_type = ? AND transaction_date >= ? AND transaction_date < ?
SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM members WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date_of_birth) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

SELECT *, TO_CHAR(date_of_birth, 'FMMonth DD') as birthday_display, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date_of_birth) as birth_month, EXTRACT(DAY FROM date_of_birth) as birth_day FROM members WHERE (EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date_of_birth) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM date_of_birth) >= EXTR
SELECT gender, COUNT(*) as count FROM members GROUP BY gender

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, date_of_birth)) < 18 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS under_18, SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, date_of_birth)) BETWEEN 18 AND 35 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS age_18_35, SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, date_of_birth)) BETWEEN

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) as total FROM finances WHERE recorded_by = ? AND transaction_date >= ? AND transaction_date < ? AND transaction_type IN (?,?,?,?,?,?,?)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) as total FROM finances WHERE recorded_by = ? AND transaction_date >= ? AND transaction_date < ? AND transaction_type IN (?,?,?,?,?,?,?)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) as total, COUNT(*) as count_total FROM finances WHERE recorded_by = ? AND transaction_type IN (?,?,?,?,?,?,?)

SELECT transaction_type, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) as total, COUNT(*) as count_total FROM finances WHERE recorded_by = ? AND transaction_type IN (?,?,?,?,?,?,?) GROUP BY transaction_type ORDER BY transaction_type ASC
SELECT SUM(amount) as total FROM finances WHERE transaction_type <> 'Expense' AND transaction_date >= ? AND transaction_date < ?
SELECT SUM(amount) as total FROM finances WHERE transaction_type = 'Expense' AND transaction_date >= ? AND transaction_date < ?

SELECT m.id, m.thread_id, m.sender_id, CASE WHEN COALESCE(m.deleted_for_all, FALSE) THEN '' ELSE m.message END AS message, m.created_at, COALESCE(m.deleted_for_all, FALSE) AS deleted_for_all, u.name as sender_name, u.photo_path as sender_photo FROM chat_messages m INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = m.send
